question:
Will Blaublitz Akita vs. Vegalta Sendai end in a draw?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 23, 2025
If the game ends in a draw, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve to "Yes".

Resolution source: https://www.jleague.jp/en/

evidences.title: J2 League
evidences.content: As of November 17, 2025, the 2025 MEIJI YASUDA J2 League season is ongoing, with approximately 37 matchdays completed out of 42, and no champion yet determined; the leader and standings are subject to change with remaining fixtures.(#ref-1)](#ref-1) ### Promotion and playoff history [...] the path and guaranteeing three total promotions annually.(#ref-85)](#ref-85) Notable playoff outcomes highlight the drama of these contests, such as Fagiano Okayama's 2–0 victory over Vegalta Sendai in the 2024 final on December 6, marking their first-ever ascent to J1 after 16 years in the second tier. Earlier examples include Tokyo Verdy's 2023 playoff triumph, returning them to J1 after 15 seasons away, secured via a penalty shootout win against Shimizu S-Pulse in the final. The 2019 J2 promotion playoff semi-final between Kyoto Sanga and Ventforet Kofu drew significant attention, underscoring growing fan interest in these high-stakes encounters.(#ref-86)](#ref-86)(#ref-87)](#ref-87) Promoted teams have shown varied success in J1, with some achieving stability while others face [...] reflecting the physical intensity of the promotion battle.(#ref-61)](#ref-61)(#ref-62)](#ref-62)(#ref-63)](#...
